description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named linux that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow has two jobs: test and package-appImage. The test job runs on ubuntu-18.04, checks out the code, sets up build variables, installs Qt 5.15.2 and dependencies, sets up kColorPicker and kImageAnnotator, builds the project with tests, and runs tests. The package-appImage job depends on test, runs on ubuntu-18.04, and performs similar setup and build steps before building an AppImage and uploading it.
